texto: Trust is so valuable. It's sometimes hard to gain, but so easy to lose. One must always be careful about trusting another, but there are times where people are too careful or too afraid & forget how to open up to those who won't do any harm. Choose wisely who you trust, but don't worry too much. Disappointment occurs, but life goes on
explicacao: Orientação direta de Emily Gabriela Vira sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Trust is so valuable. It's sometimes hard to gain, but so easy to lose. One must always be carefu…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, people, trust, útil em momentos de trust.

texto: Beauty isn't just a pretty face, a beautiful body or even a cute voice. Beauty arises from your mind, your soul, and most important your personality. But most people don't seem to notice.
